prompt: Add a watermark of a fictional research institute.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Add a subtle, semi-transparent text watermark representing a fictional research institute. Position the watermark in the bottom-right corner of the information graphic, ensuring it does not obscure any existing data points, labels, or axes. The watermark should feature the institute's name in a clean, professional font.
objects: Axes with labels ("Urban Population Percentage", "Improved Drinking Water Coverage", "Improved Sanitation Coverage")
Chart title ("Relationships of Water Supply, Sanitation and Urban Population Rate")
Country name labels (e.g., Brazil, USA, Haiti, India)
Subtle, semi-transparent text watermark in the bottom-right corner
